chunks.title: Inner Curtains of the Tabernacle
chunks.reason: Detailed instructions for constructing the ten linen curtains with cherubim and their joining mechanism.

chunks.title: Outer Coverings of the Tabernacle
chunks.reason: Instructions for the goat hair tent and the protective coverings of ram and porpoise skins.

chunks.title: Boards and Bars of the Tabernacle
chunks.reason: Specifications for the acacia wood boards, silver bases, and gold overlay bars forming the structure.

chunks.title: The Veil and Interior Arrangement
chunks.reason: Directions for the separating veil, pillars, ark placement, and positioning of the table and lampstand.

chunks.title: Screen for the Tent Doorway
chunks.reason: Final instructions for the woven screen and its five pillars at the entrance.
